opening_angle: connect role's focus on GitLab platform delivery and consulting to candidate's pattern of building maintainable, operationally reliable tooling for security teams
paragraph_focus: direct alignment with senior devsecops consulting role and trility's client-facing engineering model
current uc op experience building production security systems with data reconciliation and remediation automation
earlier endpoint automation and phishing detection project showing pragmatic engineering and measurable outcomes
reiteration of ownership pattern across design through production support with emphasis on documentation and guardrails
voice_controls: avoid generic consulting buzzwords like 'synergy' or 'holistic'; use concrete verbs like build, ship, document, reconcile, automate
replace vague claims about 'transforming security posture' with specific actions like 'standardized asset remediation workflows' or 'built containerized services for security data integration'
claims_to_avoid: any claim about managing large teams or direct reports (role is individual contributor consulting)
inventing specific client outcomes or metrics not present in source material
asserting expertise in tools or frameworks beyond what is explicitly stated (e.g., no mention of specific GitLab features beyond platform context)
